description: Combine ordered slide images (PNG/JPG/JPEG/GIF/WEBP/BMP) from a directory into a single PDF presentation, preserving aspect ratio.
rules: read-only on inputs; emits one PDF under record_store
images are taken from IMAGES_DIR and sorted by filename
needs the Pillow (PIL) library; degrades to a stub report when absent
usage: Set IMAGES_DIR (a directory of slide images). Output: presentation.pdf.
limitation: Sorts strictly by filename — name slides 01_, 02_, ... for correct order. Requires Pillow at run time.
